parsed.clarification_question: Which primary focus should I apply to this paragraph? Choose one: A) Writing polish and clarity (R1.6), B) Logical consistency and claim–evidence alignment (R1.2/R1.3), C) Contribution/thesis reframing (R1.1), D) Section/flow reorganization (R1.5), or E) Novelty positioning vs prior work (R1.4).

rationale.RX.1: The request is ambiguous, so I will explicitly state uncertainties and limit any inferences to what the paragraph itself supports.
rationale.RX.2: I will avoid endorsing strong causal or general claims beyond what the provided text justifies and phrase any feedback conservatively.
rationale.RX.3: I will constrain the analysis strictly to the provided paragraph and not assume context from the broader paper.
rationale.RX.4: I will be mindful not to encourage practices that could manipulate users or compromise privacy when discussing notification systems.
rationale.RX.5: Any feedback will reference specific sentences or phrases from this paragraph to keep provenance clear and traceable.
